project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 music search & discovery app with App Router, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4
build_system: bun with mise for node version management. Use `eval "$(mise activate bash)"` before any build/test commands.
test_framework: No test framework currently configured - no tests exist
build_command: eval "$(mise activate bash)" && bun run build
test_command: eval "$(mise activate bash)" && bun run lint
verification_instructions: 1. Run `eval "$(mise activate bash)" && bun run lint` for ESLint. 2. Run `eval "$(mise activate bash)" && bun run build` for TypeScript + Next.js build verification.
setup_instructions: 1. `eval "$(mise activate bash)"` to activate node/bun. 2. `bun install` if needed. 3. `bun run build` to verify baseline.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Node installed via mise (MISE_NODE_VERIFY=false needed for install). bun is the package manager. No test framework configured.
contribution_requirements: Zero TypeScript errors, zero lint errors, build succeeds, responsive design, semantic HTML, WCAG 2.2 AA, Lucide React icons, design token system, 8-point grid, glass hierarchy. No console.log in production code.
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. Context providers in app/components/ (AudioPlayerContext, ThemeContext, SettingsContext, FavoritesContext, PersonalizationContext, DynamicColorProvider, ToastContext). Layout wraps all pages with providers and MiniPlayer. CSS uses custom properties with glass-* utility classes. Design Bible tokens in globals.css. Tailwind v4 with @theme inline block. iTunes API for music data, Last.fm for artist info, Apple RSS for trending. Dynamic imports with next/dynamic for heavy components.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - shared components (80+). app/components/album/ - 20 album page components. app/components/favorites/ - 5 subdirs (artists, albums, history, analytics, collections). lib/ - service modules (spotify, itunes, lastfm, lyrics, youtube, discovery, etc). types/ - additional type definitions. public/ - static assets.
